div.h1: TLB Statistics State Machine & Memory Layout

p.em: Intel-manual grade specification for PTE and TLB transitions.

ol.li: tlb_hits: Incremented for every request where V=1 (Clean, Accessed, or Dirty).
tlb_misses: Incremented on transition from INVALID.
write_backs: Triggered specifically on Dirty -> INVALID eviction.
dirty_flushes: Counted during sys_flush() or context switches.

g.text: tlb_t Structure Layout (sizeof=64 bytes, Cache Line Aligned)
